data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of net terms (Net-15/30/45) and due-date tracking. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that these features are implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for net terms and due-date tracking, but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates these functionalities have been validated or tested, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of net terms (Net-15/30/45) and due-date tracking being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
